title: Section 37
content: The provisions of the Right to Information Act, 2005 (22 of 2005) shall apply to 1[every Institute], as if it were a public authority as defined in clause (h) of section 2 of the Right to Information Act, 2005.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 31, ibid., for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020).
